details.VAL-CROSS-001: All 4 listing intelligence badge types (Best Value, Selling Fast, Only X left, Verified Listing) render on browse cards across home, football, basketball, and concert pages at 375px mobile viewport.
details.VAL-CROSS-002: Intelligence badges persist from browse cards to detail pages. Verified for Brazil jersey (Only 7 left + Verified) and Jordan vs Argentina (Selling Fast + Verified).
details.VAL-CROSS-003: Urgency counts match API source: Brazil jersey shows 'Only 7 left' matching API remainingQty=7; Brazil vs Germany shows 'Only 320 left' matching API remainingQty=320.
details.VAL-CROSS-004: Delivery timing visible before purchase on event detail pages ('Delivery & Timing' with e-ticket info) and product detail pages ('Delivery & Shipping' with shipping info).
details.VAL-CROSS-011: All browse pages load correctly with product/event data, intelligence labels, and trust badges. Detail navigation and back navigation work. No console errors.
details.VAL-CROSS-012: Account surfaces (My, Orders, Tickets, Listings) load with populated data for test user. Admin dashboard and orders load with stats and data for admin user. No console errors.
details.VAL-CROSS-013: Multiple badges on same card at 375px remain readable and non-overlapping, using flex-wrap layout with clear spacing and distinct colors.
details.VAL-CROSS-015: Full validator suite passes: 46 test files (326 tests), typecheck clean, lint clean.
